signals.headline: Solana Announces Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Integration: XRP Now Tradable on Solana Network | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Announces Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Integration: XRP Now Tradable on Solana Network | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Solana developers officially announced on April 18, 2026, that wrapped XRP (wXRP) bridged from the XRP Ledger is now live and tradable on Solana, enabling use in DeFi apps, DEXes, and Solana wallets via a lock-and-mint mechanism[1][2].  
This bridges rival networks, boosts Solana's DeFi
